data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of auto-confirmation for customers who opted into 'instant accept'. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of this functionality being executed or tested. The linked use case specifies the need for auto-confirmation, but there is no evidence of a successful transaction or confirmation process related to this feature, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of auto-confirmation process for customers who opted into 'instant accept'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
